> **摘要**: 随着生成模型生成高保真视觉内容的能力越来越强，对高效、可解释和可编辑图像表示的需求也大幅增长。 2D 高斯分布 (2DGS) 的最新进展已成为一种有前景的解决方案，提供显式控制、高可解释性和实时渲染功能（> 1000 FPS）。然而，高质量的 2DGS 通常需要后期优化。现有方法采用随机或启发式（例如梯度图），通常对图像复杂性不敏感并导致收敛速度慢（>10s）。最近的方法引入了可学习网络来预测初始高斯配置，但代价是增加了计算和架构的复杂性。为了弥补这一差距，我们提出了 Fast-2DGS，这是一种用于高效高斯图像表示的轻量级框架。具体来说，我们引入了深度高斯先验，作为条件网络实现，以捕获不同复杂度下高斯基元的空间分布。此外，我们提出了一个属性回归网络来预测密集高斯属性。实验表明，这种解开的架构可以在一次前向传递中实现高质量的重建，然后进行最少的微调。更重要的是，我们的方法在不影响视觉质量的情况下显着降低了计算成本，使 2DGS 更接近行业就绪部署。
> **Abstract**: As generative models become increasingly capable of producing high-fidelity visual content, the demand for efficient, interpretable, and editable image representations has grown substantially. Recent advances in 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) have emerged as a promising solution, offering explicit control, high interpretability, and real-time rendering capabilities (>1000 FPS). However, high-quality 2DGS typically requires post-optimization. Existing methods adopt random or heuristics (e.g., gradient maps), which are often insensitive to image complexity and lead to slow convergence (>10s). More recent approaches introduce learnable networks to predict initial Gaussian configurations, but at the cost of increased computational and architectural complexity. To bridge this gap, we present Fast-2DGS, a lightweight framework for efficient Gaussian image representation. Specifically, we introduce Deep Gaussian Prior, implemented as a conditional network to capture the spatial distribution of Gaussian primitives under different complexities. In addition, we propose an attribute regression network to predict dense Gaussian properties. Experiments demonstrate that this disentangled architecture achieves high-quality reconstruction in a single forward pass, followed by minimal fine-tuning. More importantly, our approach significantly reduces computational cost without compromising visual quality, bringing 2DGS closer to industry-ready deployment.

【207】CoRe3D: Collaborative Reasoning as a Foundation for 3D Intelligence
- **标题**: CoRe3D：协作推理作为 3D 智能的基础
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.12768
> **作者**: Tianjiao Yu,Xinzhuo Li,Yifan Shen,Yuanzhe Liu,Ismini Lourentzou
> **摘要**: 大型多模态模型的最新进展表明，显式推理机制在提高模型可靠性、可解释性和跨模态对齐方面发挥着关键作用。虽然这种以推理为中心的方法已被证明在语言和视觉任务中有效，但它们向 3D 的扩展仍然不发达。 CoRe3D 引入了统一的 3D 理解和生成推理框架，该框架联合操作语义和空间抽象，使从语言推断出的高级意图能够直接指导低级 3D 内容形成。该设计的核心是基于空间的推理表示，它将 3D 潜在空间分解为局部区域，允许模型以组合和程序的方式对几何进行推理。通过将语义思维链推理与结构化空间推理紧密耦合，CoRe3D 生成的 3D 输出表现出很强的局部一致性以及与语言描述的忠实一致。
> **Abstract**: Recent advances in large multimodal models suggest that explicit reasoning mechanisms play a critical role in improving model reliability, interpretability, and cross-modal alignment. While such reasoning-centric approaches have been proven effective in language and vision tasks, their extension to 3D remains underdeveloped. CoRe3D introduces a unified 3D understanding and generation reasoning framework that jointly operates over semantic and spatial abstractions, enabling high-level intent inferred from language to directly guide low-level 3D content formation. Central to this design is a spatially grounded reasoning representation that decomposes 3D latent space into localized regions, allowing the model to reason over geometry in a compositional and procedural manner. By tightly coupling semantic chain-of-thought inference with structured spatial reasoning, CoRe3D produces 3D outputs that exhibit strong local consistency and faithful alignment with linguistic descriptions.

## 计算机与社会(cs.CY:Computers and Society)

【1】Criminal Liability in AI-Enabled Autonomous Vehicles: A Comparative Study
- **标题**: 人工智能自动驾驶汽车的刑事责任：比较研究
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14330
> **作者**: Sahibpreet Singh,Manjit Singh
> **摘要**: 人工智能通过自动驾驶汽车 (AV) 彻底改变了交通运输，但也带来了复杂的违规刑事责任问题。本研究对美国、德国、英国、中国和印度的主要法规、现实世界的责任索赔和学术文献进行了比较法律分析；因其技术进步和对比鲜明的监管方法而被选择的司法管辖区。该研究探讨了人为错误的归因、人工智能道德代理以及自动驾驶汽车事件中主犯的识别。调查结果揭示了分散的监管格局：印度和美国依赖松散的国家法律网络，而英国颁布了开创性的《2018年自动和电动汽车法案》。德国执行严格的安全标准，根据车辆的运行模式区分责任，而中国同样致力于制定严格的责任制度。该研究的结论是，全球统一的法律标准对于促进技术创新、同时确保最小风险和明确的责任归属至关重要。
> **Abstract**: AI revolutionizes transportation through autonomous vehicles (AVs) but introduces complex criminal liability issues regarding infractions. This study employs a comparative legal analysis of primary statutes, real-world liability claims, and academic literature across the US, Germany, UK, China, and India; jurisdictions selected for their technological advancement and contrasting regulatory approaches. The research examines the attribution of human error, AI moral agency, and the identification of primary offenders in AV incidents. Findings reveal fragmented regulatory landscapes: India and the US rely on loose networks of state laws, whereas the UK enacted the pioneering Automated and Electric Vehicles Act 2018. Germany enforces strict safety standards, distinguishing liability based on the vehicle's operating mode, while China similarly aims for a stringent liability regime. The study concludes that globally harmonized legal standards are essential to foster technological innovation while ensuring minimum risk and clear liability attribution.

【2】Assessing High-Risk Systems: An EU AI Act Verification Framework
- **标题**: 评估高风险系统：欧盟人工智能法案验证框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13907
> **作者**: Alessio Buscemi,Tom Deckenbrunnen,Fahria Kabir,Nishat Mowla,Kateryna Mishchenko
> **摘要**: 在欧盟实施《人工智能法案》和其他人工智能相关法规的一个主要挑战是缺乏系统的方法来验证其法律授权。最近的调查显示，这种监管模糊性被认为是一个重大负担，导致成员国的准备情况不一致。本文提出了一个综合框架，旨在通过沿着两个基本维度组织合规性验证来帮助缩小这一差距：方法类型（控制与测试）和评估目标（数据、模型、流程和最终产品）。此外，我们的框架将核心法律要求映射到具体的核查活动，充当政策制定者和从业者之间的重要桥梁，并使法律文本与技术标准和最佳实践保持一致。所提出的方法旨在减少解释的不确定性，促进评估实践的一致性，并支持整个人工智能生命周期中监管、道德和技术观点的一致性。
> **Abstract**: A central challenge in implementing the AI Act and other AI-relevant regulations in the EU is the lack of a systematic approach to verify their legal mandates. Recent surveys show that this regulatory ambiguity is perceived as a significant burden, leading to inconsistent readiness across Member States. This paper proposes a comprehensive framework designed to help close this gap by organising compliance verification along two fundamental dimensions: the type of method (controls vs. testing) and the target of assessment (data, model, processes, and final product). Additionally, our framework maps core legal requirements to concrete verification activities, serving as a vital bridge between policymakers and practitioners, and aligning legal text with technical standards and best practices. The proposed approach aims to reduce interpretive uncertainty, promote consistency in assessment practices, and support the alignment of regulatory, ethical, and technical perspectives across the AI lifecycle.

【3】Beyond Procedural Compliance: Human Oversight as a Dimension of Well-being Efficacy in AI Governance
- **标题**: 超越程序合规性：人类监督作为人工智能治理中福祉效能的一个维度
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13768
> **作者**: Yao Xie,Walter Cullen
> **摘要**: 主要的人工智能道德准则和法律，包括《欧盟人工智能法案》，呼吁进行有效的人类监督，但没有将其定义为一种独特的、可开发的能力。本文介绍了人类监督作为一种福祉能力，位于新兴的福祉功效框架内。这一概念融合了人工智能素养、道德洞察力和对人类需求的认识，并承认某些需求可能是相互冲突或有害的。由于人们不可避免地将欲望、恐惧和兴趣投射到人工智能系统中，因此监督需要有能力检查并在必要时限制有问题的需求。作者认为，这种能力的可持续和具有成本效益的发展取决于其融入各个层次的教育，从专业培训到终身学习。人类监督作为一种福祉能力的框架提供了一条从高层监管目标到持续培养安全和道德人工智能所必需的人类能动性和责任的实用路径。本文为未来多种背景下幸福有效性的教学实施和实证验证研究奠定了理论基础。
> **Abstract**: Major AI ethics guidelines and laws, including the EU AI Act, call for effective human oversight, but do not define it as a distinct and developable capacity. This paper introduces human oversight as a well-being capacity, situated within the emerging Well-being Efficacy framework. The concept integrates AI literacy, ethical discernment, and awareness of human needs, acknowledging that some needs may be conflicting or harmful. Because people inevitably project desires, fears, and interests into AI systems, oversight requires the competence to examine and, when necessary, restrain problematic demands. The authors argue that the sustainable and cost-effective development of this capacity depends on its integration into education at every level, from professional training to lifelong learning. The frame of human oversight as a well-being capacity provides a practical path from high-level regulatory goals to the continuous cultivation of human agency and responsibility essential for safe and ethical AI. The paper establishes a theoretical foundation for future research on the pedagogical implementation and empirical validation of well-being effectiveness in multiple contexts.

【4】The algorithmic muse and the public domain: Why copyrights legal philosophy precludes protection for generative AI outputs
- **标题**: 算法缪思和公共领域：为什么版权法律哲学排除了对生成人工智能输出的保护
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13750
> **作者**: Ezieddin Elmahjub
> **摘要**: 生成式人工智能 (GenAI) 输出不受版权保护。本文阐述了原因。我们绕过传统的理论分析，重点关注原创性和作者权的黑字法律概念，以重新评估版权的基本理念。 GenAI 从根本上切断了人类创造力与表达形式的直接联系。功利主义激励、劳动应得和人格等传统理论未能为保护提供连贯的理由。公共领域构成了智力创作的默认基线。那些寻求 GenAI 输出版权保护的人承担举证责任。授予原始 GenAI 输出的版权不仅在哲学上不合理，而且还会引发前所未有的数字共享圈地，造成法律泥潭并扼杀未来的创新。该论文主张明确区分：人类对人工智能生成的作品的创造性贡献可能值得保护，但原始算法输出应保留在公共领域。
> **Abstract**: Generative AI (GenAI) outputs are not copyrightable. This article argues why. We bypass conventional doctrinal analysis that focuses on black letter law notions of originality and authorship to re-evaluate copyright's foundational philosophy. GenAI fundamentally severs the direct human creative link to expressive form. Traditional theories utilitarian incentive, labor desert and personality fail to provide coherent justification for protection. The public domain constitutes the default baseline for intellectual creations. Those seeking copyright coverage for GenAI outputs bear the burden of proof. Granting copyright to raw GenAI outputs would not only be philosophically unsound but would also trigger an unprecedented enclosure of the digital commons, creating a legal quagmire and stifling future innovation. The paper advocates for a clear distinction: human creative contributions to AI-generated works may warrant protection, but the raw algorithmic output should remain in the public domain.

【5】Instilling Organisational Values in Firefighters through Simulation-Based Training
- **标题**: 通过模拟培训向消防员灌输组织价值观
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13737
> **作者**: Nardine Osman,Manel Rodriguez-Soto,Jordi Sabater-Mir
> **摘要**: 在消防和其他紧急行动中，在压力下做出的决策具有深远的道德影响，可以显着影响事件结果和消防员的安全。传统的培训方法虽然具有基础性，但往往无法让消防员充分准备好应对混乱的紧急环境中固有的复杂道德困境和价值冲突。本文提出了一个概念框架，通过系统地将部门价值观融入基于模拟的培训来加强消防员培训。这种方法促进了更深层次的价值内化，并改善了压力下价值驱动的决策。此外，还可以利用底层工具来评估和完善部门运营协议，以便更好地与首选价值观保持一致。
> **Abstract**: In firefighting and other emergency operations, decisions made under pressure carry profound ethical weight and can significantly impact incident outcomes and firefighter safety. Traditional training methods, while foundational, often fall short in adequately preparing firefighters for the complex ethical dilemmas and value conflicts inherent in chaotic emergency environments. This paper proposes a conceptual framework for enhancing firefighter training by systematically integrating departmental values into simulation-based training. This approach fosters deeper value internalisation and improves value-driven decision-making under pressure. Furthermore, the underlying tools can also be leveraged to evaluate and refine departmental operational protocols for better alignment with preferred values.

【6】Exploring the Modular Integration of "AI + Architecture" Pedagogy in Undergraduate Design Education: A Case Study of Architectural Design III/IV Courses at Zhejiang University
- **标题**: 本科设计教育中“AI+建筑”教学法的模块化融合探索——以浙江大学建筑设计Ⅲ/IV课程为例
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13730
> **作者**: Wang Jiaqi,Lan Yi,Chen Xiang
> **摘要**: 本研究通过浙江大学2024-25级三年级本科生设计工作室的教学实验，探讨人工智能在建筑教育中的融入。课程采用双模块框架（20小时人工智能培训+嵌入式伦理讨论），在保持原有课程结构的同时，引入深度学习模型、LLM、AIGC、LoRA和ComfyUI，并有专门的技术讲师支持。研究结果证明了分阶段指导、平衡的技术伦理方法和机构支持的有效性。该模型提高了学生的数字技能和战略认知，同时解决了人工智能伦理问题，提供了一种在设计教育中结合技术和批判性学习的可复制方法。
> **Abstract**: This study investigates AI integration in architectural education through a teaching experiment in Zhejiang University's 2024-25 grade three undergraduate design studio. Adopting a dual-module framework (20-hour AI training + embedded ethics discussions), the course introduced deep learning models, LLMs, AIGC, LoRA, and ComfyUI while maintaining the original curriculum structure, supported by dedicated technical instructors. Findings demonstrate the effectiveness of phased guidance, balanced technical-ethical approaches, and institutional support. The model improved students' digital skills and strategic cognition while addressing AI ethics, providing a replicable approach combining technical and critical learning in design education.

【7】Made-in China, Thinking in America:U.S. Values Persist in Chinese LLMs
- **标题**: 中国制造，美国思考：美国中国法学硕士的价值观依然存在
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13723
> **作者**: David Haslett,Linus Ta-Lun Huang,Leila Khalatbari,Janet Hui-wen Hsiao,Antoni B. Chan
> **摘要**: 随着大型语言模型越来越多地调解信息获取和促进决策，它们正在成为美国和中国等全球参与者之间软实力竞争的工具。到目前为止，语言模型似乎与西方国家的价值观一致，但这种道德偏见的证据主要来自美国公司制作的模型。目前最先进的模型中包括一些中国制造的模型，因此我们首次大规模调查了中国和美国制造的模型如何与中国和美国人民保持一致。我们收集了十名中国模特和十名美国模特对道德基础问卷 2.0 和世界价值观调查的回答，并将他们的回答与数千名中国人和美国人的回答进行了比较。我们发现，所有模特对这两项调查的反应都更像美国人，而不是中国人。当用中文提示模特或将中国人的形象强加给模特时，这种对美国价值观的偏向只会略有缓解。这些发现对不久的将来具有重要意义，在不久的将来，大型语言模型将生成人们消费的大部分内容并塑造地缘政治的规范影响。
> **Abstract**: As large language models increasingly mediate access to information and facilitate decision-making, they are becoming instruments in soft power competitions between global actors such as the United States and China. So far, language models seem to be aligned with the values of Western countries, but evidence for this ethical bias comes mostly from models made by American companies. The current crop of state-of-the-art models includes several made in China, so we conducted the first large-scale investigation of how models made in China and the USA align with people from China and the USA. We elicited responses to the Moral Foundations Questionnaire 2.0 and the World Values Survey from ten Chinese models and ten American models, and we compared their responses to responses from thousands of Chinese and American people. We found that all models respond to both surveys more like American people than like Chinese people. This skew toward American values is only slightly mitigated when prompting the models in Chinese or imposing a Chinese persona on the models. These findings have important implications for a near future in which large language models generate much of the content people consume and shape normative influence in geopolitics.

【8】Enhancing Transparency and Traceability in Healthcare AI: The AI Product Passport
- **标题**: 增强医疗保健人工智能的透明度和可追溯性：人工智能产品护照
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13702
> **作者**: A. Anil Sinaci,Senan Postaci,Dogukan Cavdaroglu,Machteld J. Boonstra,Okan Mercan,Kerem Yilmaz,Gokce B. Laleci Erturkmen,Folkert W. Asselbergs,Karim Lekadir
> **摘要**: 目标：开发 AI 产品护照，这是一个基于标准的框架，通过基于生命周期的文档来提高医疗保健 AI 的透明度、可追溯性和合规性。材料和方法：AI 产品护照是在 AI4HF 项目内开发的，专注于心力衰竭 AI 工具。我们分析了监管框架（欧盟人工智能法案、FDA 指南）和现有标准，以设计一个关系数据模型，捕获人工智能生命周期各个阶段的元数据：研究定义、数据集准备、模型生成/评估、部署/监控和通行证生成。 MLOps/ModelOps 概念被集成以实现操作相关性。共同创造涉及来自 AI4HF 联盟和里斯本研讨会的反馈，该研讨会有 21 个不同的利益相关者，并通过 Mentimeter 民意调查进行评估。该开源平台是使用 Python 库实现的，用于自动追踪来源。结果：AI 产品通行证是根据现有标准和方法设计的，具有明确的生命周期管理和基于角色的访问。它的实现是一个基于网络的平台，具有支持可审计文档的关系数据模型。它生成机器可读和人类可读的报告，可供利益相关者定制。它符合 FUTURE-AI 原则（公平性、普遍性、可追溯性、可用性、鲁棒性、可解释性），确保公平性、可追溯性和可用性。导出的通行证详细介绍了模型用途、数据来源、性能和部署上下文。 GitHub 托管的后端/前端代码库增强了可访问性。讨论和结论：人工智能产品通行证解决了医疗保健人工智能领域的透明度差距，满足监管和道德要求。其开源性质和与标准的一致性可促进信任和适应性。未来的增强功能包括公平数据原则和 FHIR 集成，以提高互操作性，促进负责任的人工智能部署。
> **Abstract**: Objective: To develop the AI Product Passport, a standards-based framework improving transparency, traceability, and compliance in healthcare AI via lifecycle-based documentation. Materials and Methods: The AI Product Passport was developed within the AI4HF project, focusing on heart failure AI tools. We analyzed regulatory frameworks (EU AI Act, FDA guidelines) and existing standards to design a relational data model capturing metadata across AI lifecycle phases: study definition, dataset preparation, model generation/evaluation, deployment/monitoring, and passport generation. MLOps/ModelOps concepts were integrated for operational relevance. Co-creation involved feedback from AI4HF consortium and a Lisbon workshop with 21 diverse stakeholders, evaluated via Mentimeter polls. The open-source platform was implemented with Python libraries for automated provenance tracking. Results: The AI Product Passport was designed based on existing standards and methods with well-defined lifecycle management and role-based access. Its implementation is a web-based platform with a relational data model supporting auditable documentation. It generates machine- and human-readable reports, customizable for stakeholders. It aligns with FUTURE-AI principles (Fairness, Universality, Traceability, Usability, Robustness, Explainability), ensuring fairness, traceability, and usability. Exported passports detail model purpose, data provenance, performance, and deployment context. GitHub-hosted backend/frontend codebases enhance accessibility. Discussion and Conclusion: The AI Product Passport addresses transparency gaps in healthcare AI, meeting regulatory and ethical demands. Its open-source nature and alignment with standards foster trust and adaptability. Future enhancements include FAIR data principles and FHIR integration for improved interoperability, promoting responsible AI deployment.

【9】Writing in Symbiosis: Mapping Human Creative Agency in the AI Era
- **标题**: 共生写作：绘制人工智能时代的人类创意机构
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13697
> **作者**: Vivan Doshi,Mengyuan Li
> **摘要**: 大型语言模型 (LLM) 的激增提出了一个关键问题：当我们与有说服力和创造力的机器建立日益紧密的共生关系时，人类意味着什么。本文研究了创意写作中人类与人工智能共同进化的模式，研究了人类工艺和机构如何与机器能力一起适应。我们通过检查纵向写作数据中的不同模式来挑战流行的风格同质化概念。使用跨越 LLM 时代前后的大规模语料库，我们观察到暗示“双轨进化”的模式：围绕人工智能相关主题的主题融合，加上结构化的风格差异。我们的分析揭示了三种新出现的适应模式：作者与人工智能风格的相似性增加，相似性降低，以及在参与人工智能相关主题时保持风格稳定性。这张创意原型图阐明了作者身份如何与人工智能共同演化，有助于讨论人类与人工智能的协作、检测挑战和创意多样性的保护。
> **Abstract**: The proliferation of Large Language Models (LLMs) raises a critical question about what it means to be human when we share an increasingly symbiotic relationship with persuasive and creative machines. This paper examines patterns of human-AI coevolution in creative writing, investigating how human craft and agency are adapting alongside machine capabilities. We challenge the prevailing notion of stylistic homogenization by examining diverse patterns in longitudinal writing data. Using a large-scale corpus spanning the pre- and post-LLM era, we observe patterns suggestive of a "Dual-Track Evolution": thematic convergence around AI-related topics, coupled with structured stylistic differentiation. Our analysis reveals three emergent adaptation patterns: authors showing increased similarity to AI style, those exhibiting decreased similarity, and those maintaining stylistic stability while engaging with AI-related themes. This Creative Archetype Map illuminates how authorship is coevolving with AI, contributing to discussions about human-AI collaboration, detection challenges, and the preservation of creative diversity.

【10】Embedding-Based Rankings of Educational Resources based on Learning Outcome Alignment: Benchmarking, Expert Validation, and Learner Performance
- **标题**: 基于学习成果一致性的教育资源嵌入排名：基准测试、专家验证和学习者表现
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13658
> **作者**: Mohammadreza Molavi,Mohammad Moein,Mohammadreza Tavakoli,Abdolali Faraji,Stefan T. Mol,Gábor Kismihók
> **摘要**: 随着在线学习格局的发展，个性化的需求日益明显。尽管教育资源正在迅速增长，但教育工作者在选择既符合预期学习成果又满足不同学习者需求的材料方面面临着挑战。大型语言模型 (LLM) 因其创建更好支持个性化的学习资源的潜力而吸引了越来越多的兴趣，但验证预期结果的覆盖范围仍然需要人工对齐审查，这成本高昂且限制了可扩展性。我们提出了一个框架，支持以具有成本效益的方式自动化评估教育资源和预期学习成果之间的一致性。使用人类生成的材料，我们对基于 LLM 的文本嵌入模型进行了基准测试，发现最准确的模型 (Voyage) 在检测对齐方面达到了 79% 的准确率。然后，我们将最佳模型应用于法学硕士生成的资源，并通过专家评估，确认它可靠地评估了与预期结果的对应性（准确度为 83%）。最后，在 360 名学习者参与的三组实验中，较高的对齐分数与较高的学习成绩呈正相关，卡方 (2, N = 360) = 15.39，p < 0.001。这些发现表明，基于嵌入的一致性分数可以通过确认与学习成果的一致性来促进可扩展的个性化，这使教师能够专注于根据不同学习者的需求定制内容。
> **Abstract**: As the online learning landscape evolves, the need for personalization is increasingly evident. Although educational resources are burgeoning, educators face challenges selecting materials that both align with intended learning outcomes and address diverse learner needs. Large Language Models (LLMs) are attracting growing interest for their potential to create learning resources that better support personalization, but verifying coverage of intended outcomes still requires human alignment review, which is costly and limits scalability. We propose a framework that supports the cost-effective automation of evaluating alignment between educational resources and intended learning outcomes. Using human-generated materials, we benchmarked LLM-based text-embedding models and found that the most accurate model (Voyage) achieved 79% accuracy in detecting alignment. We then applied the optimal model to LLM-generated resources and, via expert evaluation, confirmed that it reliably assessed correspondence to intended outcomes (83% accuracy). Finally, in a three-group experiment with 360 learners, higher alignment scores were positively related to greater learning performance, chi-squared(2, N = 360) = 15.39, p < 0.001. These findings show that embedding-based alignment scores can facilitate scalable personalization by confirming alignment with learning outcomes, which allows teachers to focus on tailoring content to diverse learner needs.

## 数据结构和算法(cs.DS:Data Structures and Algorithms)

【1】An Improved Approximation Algorithm for Maximum Weight 3-Path Packing
- **标题**: 最大权重三路径打包的改进近似算法
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14457
> **作者**: Jingyang Zhao,Mingyu Xiao
> **摘要**: 给定一个具有 $n$ 个顶点和非负边权重的完整图，其中 $n$ 可被 3 整除，最大权重 3 路径打包问题是找到一组 $n/3$ 顶点不相交的 3 路径，使得打包中 3 路径的总权重最大化。该问题与经典的最大权匹配问题密切相关。在本文中，我们提出了一种 $10/17$ 近似算法，改进了最著名的 $7/12$ 近似算法 (ESA 2015)。我们的结果是通过在三种算法之间进行权衡而获得的。第一个基于大小 $n/2$ 的最大权重匹配，第二个基于大小 $n/3$ 的最大权重匹配，最后一个基于星型打包的近似算法。我们的第一个算法与之前的$7/12$近似算法相同，但是我们针对这个问题提出了一种新的分析方法——计费方法，这不仅对于分析我们的第二个算法至关重要，而且还可以扩展到分析一些相关问题的算法。
> **Abstract**: Given a complete graph with $n$ vertices and non-negative edge weights, where $n$ is divisible by 3, the maximum weight 3-path packing problem is to find a set of $n/3$ vertex-disjoint 3-paths such that the total weight of the 3-paths in the packing is maximized. This problem is closely related to the classic maximum weight matching problem. In this paper, we propose a $10/17$-approximation algorithm, improving the best-known $7/12$-approximation algorithm (ESA 2015). Our result is obtained by making a trade-off among three algorithms. The first is based on the maximum weight matching of size $n/2$, the second is based on the maximum weight matching of size $n/3$, and the last is based on an approximation algorithm for star packing. Our first algorithm is the same as the previous $7/12$-approximation algorithm, but we propose a new analysis method -- a charging method -- for this problem, which is not only essential to analyze our second algorithm but also may be extended to analyze algorithms for some related problems.

【2】Cost-Free Neutrality for the River Method
- **标题**: 河流法的无成本中立性
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14409
> **作者**: Michelle Döring,Jannes Malanowski,Stefan Neubert
> **摘要**: 最近，河流方法被引入作为分割周期投票规则的新颖改进。 River的决策过程与成熟的排名对法密切相关。两种方法都考虑根据选民的偏好计算出的利润图，并消除该图中的多数循环来选择获胜者。由于平局可能出现在边际图中，因此除了偏好之外还需要平局。虽然这样的决胜局使计算变得高效，但它损害了中立性的基本属性：投票规则不应该提前支持替代方案。重新引入中立性的一种方法是使用平行宇宙决胜局 (PUT)，其中每个选项如果根据任何可能的决胜局获胜，则为获胜者。不幸的是，用 PUT 计算排名对选出的获胜者是 NP 完全的。鉴于河牌与排名对的相似性，人们可能会认为河牌也会遭受同样的复杂性。令人惊讶的是，我们展示了相反的结果：我们提出了一种用 PUT 计算 River 获胜者的多项式时间算法，突出了 River 相对于排名对的显着结构优势。我们的 Fused-Universe (FUN) 算法模拟 River 中的每一次可能的决胜局。从生成的 FUN 图表中，人们可以直接读出一组获胜者，以及每个获胜者的证书，解释该替代方案如何主导其他替代方案。
> **Abstract**: Recently, the River Method was introduced as novel refinement of the Split Cycle voting rule. The decision-making process of River is closely related to the well established Ranked Pairs Method. Both methods consider a margin graph computed from the voters' preferences and eliminate majority cycles in that graph to choose a winner. As ties can occur in the margin graph, a tiebreaker is required along with the preferences. While such a tiebreaker makes the computation efficient, it compromises the fundamental property of neutrality: the voting rule should not favor alternatives in advance. One way to reintroduce neutrality is to use Parallel-Universe Tiebreaking (PUT), where each alternative is a winner if it wins according to any possible tiebreaker. Unfortunately, computing the winners selected by Ranked Pairs with PUT is NP-complete. Given the similarity of River to Ranked Pairs, one might expect River to suffer from the same complexity. Surprisingly, we show the opposite: We present a polynomial-time algorithm for computing River winners with PUT, highlighting significant structural advantages of River over Ranked Pairs. Our Fused-Universe (FUN) algorithm simulates River for every possible tiebreaking in one pass. From the resulting FUN diagram one can then directly read off both the set of winners and, for each winner, a certificate that explains how this alternative dominates the others.

【3】Finding $b$-colorings Using Feedback Edges
- **标题**: 使用反馈边缘查找 $b$-着色
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14390
> **作者**: Jakub Balabán
> **摘要**: 图的 $b$ 着色是一种适当的顶点着色，这样每个颜色类都包含一个可以看到其邻域中所有其他颜色的顶点。 $b$ 着色问题的任务是确定图是否允许具有 $k$ 颜色的 $b$ 着色，一般来说是 NP 完全的，但在树上是多时间可解的。此外，众所周知，在 XP 中 $b$ 着色是有效的，但当通过树宽参数化时，对于所有 $t \in \mathbb{N}$ 来说，W[$t$]-hard 是困难的。事实上，只有很少的参数（例如顶点覆盖数）已知可用于 $b$ 着色的 FPT 算法。在本文中，我们考虑一个比树宽度更具限制性的参数来测量与树的相似性，即反馈边数，并表明在这种参数化下$b$着色是固定参数可处理的。我们的算法将参数化算法中使用的标准技术与树的多时间算法中使用的特定于问题的思想相结合。此外，我们提出了一种通过到共簇的距离参数化的 $b$ 着色的 FPT 算法，这是一个测量与完整多部分图相似性的参数。最后，我们根据已知结果进行了一些观察，包括当通过树深度参数化时，$b$-着色是 W[$1$]-hard。
> **Abstract**: A $b$-coloring of a graph is a proper vertex coloring such that each color class contains a vertex that sees all other colors in its neighborhood. The $b$-coloring problem, in which the task is to decide whether a graph admits a $b$-coloring with $k$ colors, is NP-complete in general but polytime solvable on trees. Moreover, it is known that $b$-coloring is in XP but W[$t$]-hard for all $t \in \mathbb{N}$ when parameterized by tree-width. In fact, only very few parameters, such as the vertex cover number, were known to admit an FPT algorithm for $b$-coloring. In this paper, we consider a more restrictive parameter measuring similarity to trees than tree-width, namely the feedback edge number, and show that $b$-coloring is fixed-parameter tractable under this parameterization. Our algorithm combines standard techniques used in parameterized algorithmics with the problem-specific ideas used in the polytime algorithm for trees. In addition, we present an FPT algorithm for $b$-coloring parameterized by distance to co-cluster, which is a parameter measuring similarity to complete multipartite graphs. Finally, we make several observations based on known results, including that $b$-coloring is W[$1$]-hard when parameterized by tree-depth.

【4】Space Efficient Algorithms for Parameterised Problems
- **标题**: 参数化问题的空间高效算法
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13342
> **作者**: Sheikh Shakil Akhtar,Pranabendu Misra,Geevarghese Philip
> **摘要**: 我们研究针对内存有限的图问题的“空间高效”FPT 算法。令 n 为输入图的大小，k 为参数。我们提出了在 f(k)*poly(n) 时间内运行并使用 g(k)*polylog(n) 工作空间的算法，其中 f 和 g 是 k 的单独函数，适用于 k-Path、MaxLeaf SubTree 和 Trees 中的 Multicut。这些算法的动机是大数据环境，必须解决非常大的问题实例，并且使用 Poly(n) 内存非常昂贵。它们在理论上也很有趣，因为大多数标准方法工具（例如删除大量顶点或边）都不可用，我们必须开发不同的方法来解决它们。
> **Abstract**: We study "space efficient" FPT algorithms for graph problems with limited memory. Let n be the size of the input graph and k be the parameter. We present algorithms that run in time f(k)*poly(n) and use g(k)*polylog(n) working space, where f and g are functions of k alone, for k-Path, MaxLeaf SubTree and Multicut in Trees. These algorithms are motivated by big-data settings where very large problem instances must be solved, and using poly(n) memory is prohibitively expensive. They are also theoretically interesting, since most of the standard methods tools, such as deleting a large set of vertices or edges, are unavailable, and we must a develop different way to tackle them.

【5】Kernelization dichotomies for hitting minors under structural parameterizations
- **标题**: 结构参数化下打击未成年人的内核化二分法
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13210
> **作者**: Marin Bougeret,Eric Brandwein,Ignasi Sau
> **摘要**: 对于连通图 $\mathcal{F}$ 的有限集合，$\mathcal{F}$-MINOR-DELETION 问题在于，给定图 $G$ 和整数 $\ell$，确定 $G$ 是否包含大小至多为 $\ell$ 的顶点集，其删除会导致 $\mathcal{F}$-minor-free 图。我们通过解决方案大小将 $\mathcal{F}$-MINOR-DELETION 的（近似）多项式核的存在性提升为由到 $\mathcal{F}$-minor-free 图的有界消除距离图的顶点删除距离参数化的（近似）多项式核。这会为包含平面图的每个族 $\mathcal{F}$ 生成精确的多项式内核，以及用于平面顶点删除的近似多项式内核。此外，将我们的结果与先前的下界相结合，我们得到以下无限二分集，假设 $NP \not\subseteq coNP/poly$：对于包含平面图的至少三个顶点上的双连通图的任何有限集 $\mathcal{F}$，并且图的任何次闭类 $\mathcal{C}$，$\mathcal{F}$-MINOR-DELETION 都允许参数化为多项式核到 $\mathcal{C}$ 的顶点删除距离当且仅当 $\mathcal{C}$ 具有到 $\mathcal{F}$ 无次要图的有界消除距离。例如，对于每个整数 $t \geq 0$，这会产生 CACTUS VERTEX DELETION、OUTERPLANAR VERTEX DELETION 和 TREEWIDTH-$t$ VERTEX DELETION 的二分法。在我们的工作之前，这种二分法仅在 VERTEX COVER 和 FEEDBACK VERTEX SET 的特殊情况下为人所知。我们的方法建立在 Jansen 和 Pieterse [Theor.计算。科学。 2020]，还使用了 Jansen、de Kroon 和 Wlodarczyk [STOC 2021] 的一些结果的改编版。
> **Abstract**: For a finite collection of connected graphs $\mathcal{F}$, the $\mathcal{F}$-MINOR-DELETION problem consists in, given a graph $G$ and an integer $\ell$, deciding whether $G$ contains a vertex set of size at most $\ell$ whose removal results in an $\mathcal{F}$-minor-free graph. We lift the existence of (approximate) polynomial kernels for $\mathcal{F}$-MINOR-DELETION by the solution size to (approximate) polynomial kernels parameterized by the vertex-deletion distance to graphs of bounded elimination distance to $\mathcal{F}$-minor-free graphs. This results in exact polynomial kernels for every family $\mathcal{F}$ that contains a planar graph, and an approximate polynomial kernel for PLANAR VERTEX DELETION. Moreover, combining our result with a previous lower bound, we obtain the following infinite set of dichotomies, assuming $NP \not\subseteq coNP/poly$: for any finite set $\mathcal{F}$ of biconnected graphs on at least three vertices containing a planar graph, and any minor-closed class of graphs $\mathcal{C}$, $\mathcal{F}$-MINOR-DELETION admits a polynomial kernel parameterized by the vertex-deletion distance to $\mathcal{C}$ if and only if $\mathcal{C}$ has bounded elimination distance to $\mathcal{F}$-minor-free graphs. For instance, this yields dichotomies for CACTUS VERTEX DELETION, OUTERPLANAR VERTEX DELETION, and TREEWIDTH-$t$ VERTEX DELETION for every integer $t \geq 0$. Prior to our work, such dichotomies were only known for the particular cases of VERTEX COVER and FEEDBACK VERTEX SET. Our approach builds on the techniques developed by Jansen and Pieterse [Theor. Comput. Sci. 2020] and also uses adaptations of some of the results by Jansen, de Kroon, and Wlodarczyk [STOC 2021].

【6】Deterministic and Exact Fully-dynamic Minimum Cut of Superpolylogarithmic Size in Subpolynomial Time
- **标题**: 次多项式时间内超多对数大小的确定性精确全动态最小割
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13105
> **作者**: Antoine El-Hayek,Monika Henzinger,Jason Li
> **摘要**: 我们提出了一种精确的全动态最小割算法，当任何 $c>0$ 的最小割尺寸至多为 $2^{θ(\log^{3/4-c}n)}$ 时，该算法在 $n^{o(1)}$ 确定性更新时间内运行，改进了 Jin、Sun 和 Thorup 之前的算法 (SODA 2024)，其最小割尺寸限制为 $(\log n)^{o(1)}$。结合图稀疏化，我们在$n^{o(1)}$随机更新时间内，对于任何$ε\ge2^{-θ(\log^{3/4-c}n)}$，在加权图上获得第一个$(1+ε)$近似全动态最小割算法。我们的主要技术贡献是确定性局部最小割算法，它取代了 El-Hayek、Henzinger 和 Li 的随机 LocalKCut 过程（SODA 2025）。
> **Abstract**: We present an exact fully-dynamic minimum cut algorithm that runs in $n^{o(1)}$ deterministic update time when the minimum cut size is at most $2^{Θ(\log^{3/4-c}n)}$ for any $c>0$, improving on the previous algorithm of Jin, Sun, and Thorup (SODA 2024) whose minimum cut size limit is $(\log n)^{o(1)}$. Combined with graph sparsification, we obtain the first $(1+ε)$-approximate fully-dynamic minimum cut algorithm on weighted graphs, for any $ε\ge2^{-Θ(\log^{3/4-c}n)}$, in $n^{o(1)}$ randomized update time. Our main technical contribution is a deterministic local minimum cut algorithm, which replaces the randomized LocalKCut procedure from El-Hayek, Henzinger, and Li (SODA 2025).

【7】Sub-$n^k$ Deterministic algorithm for minimum $k$-way cut in simple graphs
- **标题**: 简单图中最小 $k$ 路切割的 Sub-$n^k$ 确定性算法
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.12900
> **作者**: Mohit Daga
> **摘要**: 我们针对简单图上的\emph{最小$k$割问题}提出了\emph{确定性精确算法}。 Our approach combines the \emph{principal sequence of partitions (PSP)}, derived canonically from ideal loads, with a single level of \emph{Kawarabayashi--Thorup (KT)} contractions at the critical PSP threshold~$λ_j$.令 $j$ 为 $κ(P_j)\ge k$ 和 $R := k - κ(P_{j-1})$ 的最小索引。 We prove a structural decomposition theorem showing that an optimal $k$-cut can be expressed as the level-$(j\!-\!1)$ boundary $A_{\le j-1}$ together with exactly $(R-r)$ \emph{non-trivial} internal cuts of value at most~$λ_j$ and $r$ \emph{singleton isolations} (``islands'') inside the parts of~$P_{j-1}$.在这个级别上，KT 收缩产生总大小 $\widetilde{O}(n / λ_j)$ 的内核，并根据它们我们构​​建一个相同阶数的 \emph{canonical border family}~$\mathcal{B}$ ，确定性地覆盖所有最佳细化选择。 Branching only over~$\mathcal{B}$ (and also including an explicit ``island'' branch) gives total running time $$ T(n,m,k) = \widetilde{O}\left(\mathrm{poly}(m)+\Bigl(\tfrac{n}{λ_j}+n^{ω/3}\Bigr)^{R}\right), $$ where $ω< 2.373$ is the matrix multiplication指数。 In particular, if $λ_j \ge n^{\varepsilon}$ for some constant $\varepsilon > 0$, we obtain a \emph{deterministic sub-$n^k$-time algorithm}, running in $n^{(1-\varepsilon)(k-1)+o(k)}$ time. Finally, combining our PSP$\times$KT framework with a small-$λ$ exact subroutine via a simple meta-reduction yields a deterministic $n^{c k+O(1)}$ algorithm for $c = \max\{ t/(t+1), ω/3 \} < 1$, aligning with the exponent in the randomized bound of He--Li (STOC~2022) under the assumed subroutine.
> **Abstract**: We present a \emph{deterministic exact algorithm} for the \emph{minimum $k$-cut problem} on simple graphs. Our approach combines the \emph{principal sequence of partitions (PSP)}, derived canonically from ideal loads, with a single level of \emph{Kawarabayashi--Thorup (KT)} contractions at the critical PSP threshold~$λ_j$. Let $j$ be the smallest index with $κ(P_j)\ge k$ and $R := k - κ(P_{j-1})$. We prove a structural decomposition theorem showing that an optimal $k$-cut can be expressed as the level-$(j\!-\!1)$ boundary $A_{\le j-1}$ together with exactly $(R-r)$ \emph{non-trivial} internal cuts of value at most~$λ_j$ and $r$ \emph{singleton isolations} (``islands'') inside the parts of~$P_{j-1}$. At this level, KT contractions yield kernels of total size $\widetilde{O}(n / λ_j)$, and from them we build a \emph{canonical border family}~$\mathcal{B}$ of the same order that deterministically covers all optimal refinement choices. Branching only over~$\mathcal{B}$ (and also including an explicit ``island'' branch) gives total running time $$ T(n,m,k) = \widetilde{O}\left(\mathrm{poly}(m)+\Bigl(\tfrac{n}{λ_j}+n^{ω/3}\Bigr)^{R}\right), $$ where $ω< 2.373$ is the matrix multiplication exponent. In particular, if $λ_j \ge n^{\varepsilon}$ for some constant $\varepsilon > 0$, we obtain a \emph{deterministic sub-$n^k$-time algorithm}, running in $n^{(1-\varepsilon)(k-1)+o(k)}$ time. Finally, combining our PSP$\times$KT framework with a small-$λ$ exact subroutine via a simple meta-reduction yields a deterministic $n^{c k+O(1)}$ algorithm for $c = \max\{ t/(t+1), ω/3 \} < 1$, aligning with the exponent in the randomized bound of He--Li (STOC~2022) under the assumed subroutine.

【8】Learning with Structure: Computing Consistent Subsets on Structurally-Regular Graphs
- **标题**: 结构学习：计算结构正则图上的一致子集
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.12860
> **作者**: Aritra Banik,Mano Prakash Parthasarathi,Venkatesh Raman,Diya Roy,Abhishek Sahu
> **摘要**: 最小一致子集（MCS）问题在监督聚类和实例选择的背景下自然出现。在监督聚类中，我们的目标是使用一个小的标记子集来推断有意义的数据划分。然而，现代应用中大量的训练数据带来了巨大的计算挑战。 MCS 问题形式化了这一目标：给定度量空间中的标记数据集 $\mathcal{X}$，任务是计算最小子集 $S \subseteq \mathcal{X}$，使得 $\mathcal{X}$ 中的每个点与 $S$ 中至少一个最近的邻居共享其标签。最近，MCS 问题已扩展到图度量，其中距离由最短路径定义。先前的工作表明，即使在像树这样的简单图类上，MCS 仍然是 NP 困难的，尽管运行时 $\mathcal{O}(2^{6c} \cdot n^6)$ 的算法对于树来说是已知的，其中 $c$ 是颜色数量，$n$ 是顶点数量。这就提出了识别图类的挑战，这些图类允许算法在 $n$ 和 $c$ 中都有效。在这项工作中，我们研究图上的最小一致子集问题，重点关注两个成熟的度量：顶点覆盖数（$vc$）和邻域多样性（$nd$）。我们开发一个运行时间为 $vc^{\mathcal{O}(vc)}\cdot\text{Poly}(n,c)$ 的算法，以及另一个运行时间为 $nd^{\mathcal{O}(nd)}\cdot\text{Poly}(n,c)$ 的算法。用参数化复杂性的语言来说，这意味着 MCS 是由顶点覆盖数和邻域多样性参数化的固定参数易处理 (FPT)。值得注意的是，我们的算法对于任意多种颜色仍然有效，因为它们的复杂性多项式取决于颜色的数量。
> **Abstract**: The Minimum Consistent Subset (MCS) problem arises naturally in the context of supervised clustering and instance selection. In supervised clustering, one aims to infer a meaningful partitioning of data using a small labeled subset. However, the sheer volume of training data in modern applications poses a significant computational challenge. The MCS problem formalizes this goal: given a labeled dataset $\mathcal{X}$ in a metric space, the task is to compute a smallest subset $S \subseteq \mathcal{X}$ such that every point in $\mathcal{X}$ shares its label with at least one of its nearest neighbors in $S$. Recently, the MCS problem has been extended to graph metrics, where distances are defined by shortest paths. Prior work has shown that MCS remains NP-hard even on simple graph classes like trees, though an algorithm with runtime $\mathcal{O}(2^{6c} \cdot n^6)$ is known for trees, where $c$ is the number of colors and $n$ the number of vertices. This raises the challenge of identifying graph classes that admit algorithms efficient in both $n$ and $c$. In this work, we study the Minimum Consistent Subset problem on graphs, focusing on two well-established measures: the vertex cover number ($vc$) and the neighborhood diversity ($nd$). We develop an algorithm with running time $vc^{\mathcal{O}(vc)}\cdot\text{Poly}(n,c)$, and another algorithm with runtime $nd^{\mathcal{O}(nd)}\cdot\text{Poly}(n,c)$. In the language of parameterized complexity, this implies that MCS is fixed-parameter tractable (FPT) parameterized by the vertex cover number and the neighborhood diversity. Notably, our algorithms remain efficient for arbitrarily many colors, as their complexity is polynomially dependent on the number of colors.

## 图形(cs.GR:Graphics)

【1】Establishing Stochastic Object Models from Noisy Data via Ambient Measurement-Integrated Diffusion
- **标题**: 通过环境测量积分扩散从噪声数据建立随机对象模型
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14187
> **作者**: Jianwei Sun,Xiaoning Lei,Wenhao Cai,Xichen Xu,Yanshu Wang,Hu Gao
> **摘要**: 基于任务的图像质量 (IQ) 测量对于评估医学成像系统至关重要，它必须考虑包括解剖变异性在内的随机性。随机对象模型 (SOM) 提供了这种变异性的统计描述，但传统的数学 SOM 无法捕获真实的解剖结构，而数据驱动的方法通常需要临床任务中很少提供的干净数据。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了 AMID，一种具有噪声去耦功能的无监督环境测量集成扩散，它可以直接从噪声测量中建立干净的 SOM。 AMID 引入了一种测量集成策略，将测量噪声与扩散轨迹对齐，并显式地建模跨步骤的测量噪声和扩散噪声之间的耦合，从而在此基础上设计环境损失来学习干净的 SOM。对真实 CT 和乳房 X 线摄影数据集的实验表明，AMID 在生成保真度方面优于现有方法，并产生更可靠的基于任务的 IQ 评估，展示了其在无监督医学成像分析方面的潜力。
> **Abstract**: Task-based measures of image quality (IQ) are critical for evaluating medical imaging systems, which must account for randomness including anatomical variability. Stochastic object models (SOMs) provide a statistical description of such variability, but conventional mathematical SOMs fail to capture realistic anatomy, while data-driven approaches typically require clean data rarely available in clinical tasks. To address this challenge, we propose AMID, an unsupervised Ambient Measurement-Integrated Diffusion with noise decoupling, which establishes clean SOMs directly from noisy measurements. AMID introduces a measurement-integrated strategy aligning measurement noise with the diffusion trajectory, and explicitly models coupling between measurement and diffusion noise across steps, an ambient loss is thus designed base on it to learn clean SOMs. Experiments on real CT and mammography datasets show that AMID outperforms existing methods in generation fidelity and yields more reliable task-based IQ evaluation, demonstrating its potential for unsupervised medical imaging analysis.

## 人机交互(cs.HC:Human-Computer Interaction)

【1】Creating Opportunities: Co-designing an mHealth App with Older Adults
- **标题**: 创造机会：与老年人共同设计移动医疗应用程序
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14641
> **作者**: Abhinav Choudhry,Bashab Mazumder,Lauren Alyssa Marks,Roqaya Elmenshawy,Devorah Kletenik,Sean Mullen,Rachel F. Adler
> **摘要**: 我们与四名 60 岁以上的成年人进行了一项定性协同设计研究，收集 Figma 原型和生成式人工智能 (GenAI) 聊天机器人的设计见解，该应用程序旨在提供人工智能教练来支持老年人的体育活动。两者的初始设计都包含了几个新颖的方面：精心策划的健康知识库、基于目标和健康史的个性化响应、隐私考虑、与可穿戴设备集成以实现身体活动环境，以及动态环境注入。该研究获得了有关改善应用程序中拟议的用户体验以及与聊天机器人的对话流程的反馈，并将有助于未来旨在为老年人实施由 GenAI 驱动的健康教练的工作。
> **Abstract**: We conducted a qualitative co-design study with four adults aged 60+ to gather design insights on a Figma prototype and a generative AI (GenAI) chatbot for an app aimed at providing an AI coach to support older adults' physical activity. The initial design for both incorporates several novel aspects: a curated health knowledge base, personalised responses based on goals and health history, privacy considerations, integration with wearables for physical activity context, as well as dynamic context injection. The study yielded feedback on improving both the proposed user experience in the app and the conversation flow with the chatbot, and it will aid future work aimed at implementing a GenAI-powered health coach for older adults.

【2】The Trust in AI-Generated Health Advice (TAIGHA) Scale and Short Version (TAIGHA-S): Development and Validation Study
- **标题**: 人工智能生成健康建议的信任 (TAIGHA) 规模和简短版本 (TAIGHA-S)：开发和验证研究
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14278
> **作者**: Marvin Kopka,Azeem Majeed,Gabriella Spinelli,Austen El-Osta,Markus Feufel
> **摘要**: 大语言模型等人工智能工具越来越多地被公众用来获取健康信息和指导。在与健康相关的情况下，遵循或拒绝人工智能生成的建议可能会产生直接的临床影响。自动化系统信任度调查等现有工具评估通用技术的可信度，但没有经过验证的工具专门衡量用户对人工智能生成的健康建议的信任度。这项研究开发并验证了人工智能生成健康建议的信任度 (TAIGHA) 量表及其四项简表 (TAIGHA-S)，作为测量信任和不信任的基于理论的工具，每个工具都包含认知和情感成分。这些项目是使用生成式人工智能方法开发的，随后由 10 名领域专家进行内容验证，由 30 名非专业参与者进行面部验证，并对 385 名在症状评估场景中接受人工智能生成建议的英国参与者进行心理测量验证。自动项目减少后，保留了 28 个项目，并根据专家评分减少到 10 个。 TAIGHA 显示了出色的内容效度（S-CVI/Ave=0.99），CFA 证实了具有出色拟合度的双因素模型（CFI=0.98，TLI=0.98，RMSEA=0.07，SRMR=0.03）。内部一致性较高（α=0.95）。与自动化系统信任度调查 (r=0.67/-0.66) 和用户对人工智能建议的依赖 (r=0.37 信任) 的相关性支持收敛效度，而与阅读流量和心理负荷的低相关性支持发散效度 (所有 |r|<0.25)。 TAIGHA-S 与满量表高度相关（r=0.96），并且表现出良好的可靠性（α=0.88）。 TAIGHA 和 TAIGHA-S 是经过验证的工具，用于评估用户对人工智能生成的健康建议的信任和不信任。单独报告信任和不信任可以对人工智能干预措施进行更完整的评估，而且短期规模非常适合时间有限的环境。
> **Abstract**: Artificial Intelligence tools such as large language models are increasingly used by the public to obtain health information and guidance. In health-related contexts, following or rejecting AI-generated advice can have direct clinical implications. Existing instruments like the Trust in Automated Systems Survey assess trustworthiness of generic technology, and no validated instrument measures users' trust in AI-generated health advice specifically. This study developed and validated the Trust in AI-Generated Health Advice (TAIGHA) scale and its four-item short form (TAIGHA-S) as theory-based instruments measuring trust and distrust, each with cognitive and affective components. The items were developed using a generative AI approach, followed by content validation with 10 domain experts, face validation with 30 lay participants, and psychometric validation with 385 UK participants who received AI-generated advice in a symptom-assessment scenario. After automated item reduction, 28 items were retained and reduced to 10 based on expert ratings. TAIGHA showed excellent content validity (S-CVI/Ave=0.99) and CFA confirmed a two-factor model with excellent fit (CFI=0.98, TLI=0.98, RMSEA=0.07, SRMR=0.03). Internal consistency was high (α=0.95). Convergent validity was supported by correlations with the Trust in Automated Systems Survey (r=0.67/-0.66) and users' reliance on the AI's advice (r=0.37 for trust), while divergent validity was supported by low correlations with reading flow and mental load (all |r|<0.25). TAIGHA-S correlated highly with the full scale (r=0.96) and showed good reliability (α=0.88). TAIGHA and TAIGHA-S are validated instruments for assessing user trust and distrust in AI-generated health advice. Reporting trust and distrust separately permits a more complete evaluation of AI interventions, and the short scale is well-suited for time-constrained settings.

【3】LAPPI: Interactive Optimization with LLM-Assisted Preference-Based Problem Instantiation
- **标题**: LAPPI：基于 LLM 辅助的基于偏好的问题实例化的交互式优化
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14138
> **作者**: So Kuroki,Manami Nakagawa,Shigeo Yoshida,Yuki Koyama,Kozuno Tadashi
> **摘要**: 许多现实世界的任务，例如旅行计划或膳食计划，都可以表述为组合优化问题。然而，使用优化求解器对于最终用户来说很困难，因为它需要问题实例化：定义候选项、分配偏好分数和指定约束。我们引入了 LAPPI（LLM 辅助的基于偏好的问题实例化），这是一种交互式方法，使用大型语言模型 (LLM) 在此实例化过程中支持用户。通过自然语言对话，系统帮助用户将模糊的偏好转化为明确定义的优化问题。然后将这些实例化的问题传递给现有的优化求解器以生成解决方案。在关于旅行计划的用户研究中，我们的方法成功地捕获了用户偏好并生成了优于传统和即时工程方法的可行计划。我们通过将 LAPPI 适应其他用例来进一步展示 LAPPI 的多功能性。
> **Abstract**: Many real-world tasks, such as trip planning or meal planning, can be formulated as combinatorial optimization problems. However, using optimization solvers is difficult for end users because it requires problem instantiation: defining candidate items, assigning preference scores, and specifying constraints. We introduce LAPPI (LLM-Assisted Preference-based Problem Instantiation), an interactive approach that uses large language models (LLMs) to support users in this instantiation process. Through natural language conversations, the system helps users transform vague preferences into well-defined optimization problems. These instantiated problems are then passed to existing optimization solvers to generate solutions. In a user study on trip planning, our method successfully captured user preferences and generated feasible plans that outperformed both conventional and prompt-engineering approaches. We further demonstrate LAPPI's versatility by adapting it to an additional use case.

【4】Juicy Text: Onomatopoeia and Semantic Text Effects for Juicy Player Experiences
- **标题**: 多汁的文本：拟声词和语义文本效果，带来多汁的玩家体验
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13695
> **作者**: Émilie Fabre,Katie Seaborn,Adrien Alexandre Verhulst,Yuta Itoh,Jun Rekimoto
> **摘要**: Juiciness 是一种视觉效果，用于改善玩家体验和游戏参与度。大多数研究都集中在多汁粒子效应上。然而，文字效果在游戏中也很常见，尽管并不总是很精彩。其中一种是拟声词，这是人类语言中定义明确的元素，已被翻译成视觉媒体，例如漫画书和游戏。另一个是语义文本，通常用于在游戏中提供性能反馈。在这项工作中，我们探索了多汁性和文本效果之间的关系，旨在通过基于文本的果汁并结合粒子和文本果汁来复制多汁的用户体验。我们在多阶段受试者内实验中表明，用户对多汁文本效果的评价与粒子效果类似，具有可比的性能和更可靠的反馈。我们还暗示，当两者结合时，用户体验可能会得到改善，以及文本刺激与其他视觉刺激的感知可能会有所不同。我们贡献了关于交互式媒体视觉效果背景下有趣的文本连接的实证研究结果。
> **Abstract**: Juiciness is visual pizzazz used to improve player experience and engagement in games. Most research has focused on juicy particle effects. However, text effects are also commonly used in games, albeit not always juiced up. One type is onomatopoeia, a well-defined element of human language that has been translated to visual media, such as comic books and games. Another is semantic text, often used to provide performance feedback in games. In this work, we explored the relationship between juiciness and text effects, aiming to replicate juicy user experiences with text-based juice and combining particle and text juice. We show in a multi-phase within-subjects experiment that users rate juicy text effects similarly to particles effects, with comparable performance, and more reliable feedback. We also hint at potential improvement in user experience when both are combined, and how text stimuli may be perceived differently than other visual ones. We contribute empirical findings on the juicy-text connection in the context of visual effects for interactive media.

【5】Learning to Car-Follow Using an Inertia-Oriented Driving Technique: A Before-and-After Study on a Closed Circuit
- **标题**: 使用面向惯性的驾驶技术学习汽车跟随：闭路的前后研究
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13694
> **作者**: Kostantinos Mattas,Antonio Lucas-Alba,Tomer Toledo,Oscar M. Melchor,Shlomo Bekhor,Biagio Ciuffo
> **摘要**: 几十年来，汽车跟随和交通流量模型都假设驾驶员默认的驾驶策略是保持安全距离。之前的几项研究质疑“驾驶保持距离”是否是交通不变量。因此，驾驶员的加速减速扭矩不对称性必然决定观察到的交通振荡模式。这些研究表明，驾驶员可以按照基本说明采取替代的 CF 策略，例如驾驶保持惯性。目前的工作通过展示直接转化为闭路实践的 DI 课程的有效性，扩展了先前研究的证据。十二名车手被邀请跟随一辆在真实赛道上改变速度的领头车。然后，驾驶员参加了 DI 课程，并返回到相同的实车跟踪场景。在预测试中，驾驶员普遍采用 DD 作为默认 CF 模式，无论是在现场还是模拟 PC 条件下，都得到了非常相似的结果。在完成完整的 DI 课程后，无论是在现场还是在模拟条件下，驾驶员的加速度、减速度和速度变化均明显低于预测试，这表明驾驶员采用了 DI 策略。这项研究首次展示了在实际电路中采用 DI 策略的潜力。
> **Abstract**: For decades, car following and traffic flow models have assumed that drivers default driving strategy is to maintain a safe distance. Several previous studies have questioned whether the Driving to Keep Distance is a traffic invariant. Therefore, the acceleration deceleration torque asymmetry of drivers must necessarily determine the observed patterns of traffic oscillations. Those studies indicate that drivers can adopt alternative CF strategies, such as Driving to Keep Inertia, by following basic instructions. The present work extends the evidence from previous research by showing the effectiveness of a DI course that immediately translates into practice on a closed circuit. Twelve drivers were invited to follow a lead car that varied its speed on a real circuit. Then, the driver took a DI course and returned to the same real car following scenario. Drivers generally adopted DD as the default CF mode in the pretest, both in field and simulated PC conditions, yielding very similar results. After taking the full DI course, drivers showed significantly less acceleration, deceleration, and speed variability than did the pretest, both in the field and in the simulated conditions, which indicates that drivers adopted the DI strategy. This study is the first to show the potential of adopting a DI strategy in a real circuit.

【6】From Framework to Practice: Designing a Real-World Telehealth Application for Palliative Care
- **标题**: 从框架到实践：设计用于姑息治疗的真实远程医疗应用程序
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13693
> **作者**: Wei Zhou,Rashina Hoda,Andy Li,Chris Bain,Laura Bird,Emmy Trinh,Peter Poon,Teresa O Brien,Mahima Kalla,Olivia Metcalf,Wendy Chapman,Joycelyn Ling,Sam Georgy,David Bevan
> **摘要**: 随着数字医疗解决方案不断重塑医疗保健服务，远程医疗软件应用程序对于改善可及性、护理连续性和患者治疗结果变得至关重要。本文分析了设计一款专注于姑息治疗的增强远程医疗功能 (ETHC) 的软件应用程序，整合了三个社会技术维度：质量、人类价值观和现实世界。针对质量属性（例如性能、可维护性、安全性和保密性）进行设计，确保系统在技术上稳健并符合临床标准。为人类价值观（同理心、包容性、可及性和透明度）进行设计有助于增强患者体验、信任和道德一致性。为现实世界进行设计——通过涉及临床医生、患者和护理人员的多学科、基于经验的协同设计方法，指导原型设计、可用性测试和现实世界评估的迭代周期——确保功能的不断完善并与临床实践保持一致。由此产生的远程医疗软件解决方案表明，我们的社会技术设计框架成功地生成了安全、公平和有弹性的数字医疗应用程序。我们的设计方法可以帮助其他人设计健康和其他领域的软件。
> **Abstract**: As digital health solutions continue to reshape healthcare delivery, telehealth software applications have become vital for improving accessibility, continuity of care, and patient outcomes. This paper presents an analysis of designing a software application focused on Enhanced Telehealth Capabilities (ETHC) for palliative care, integrating across three socio-technical dimensions: quality, human values, and real-world. Designing for quality attributes -- such as performance, maintainability, safety, and security -- ensured that the system is technically robust and compliant with clinical standards. Designing for human values -- empathy, inclusivity, accessibility, and transparency -- helped enhance patient experience, trust, and ethical alignment. Designing for real-world -- through a multidisciplinary, experience-based co-design approach involving clinicians, patients, and carers that guided iterative cycles of prototyping, usability testing, and real-world evaluation -- ensured continuous refinement of features and alignment with clinical practice. The resulting telehealth software solution demonstrated that our socio-technical design framework was successful in producing a secure, equitable, and resilient digital health application. Our design approach can assist others designing software in health and other domains.

【7】Platforms as Crime Scene, Judge, and Jury: How Victim-Survivors of Non-Consensual Intimate Imagery Report Abuse Online
- **标题**: 作为犯罪现场、法官和陪审团的平台：未经同意的亲密图像的受害者幸存者如何举报网上虐待行为
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13500
> **作者**: Li Qiwei,Katelyn Kennon,Nicole Bedera,Asia A. Eaton,Eric Gilbert,Sarita Schoenebeck
> **摘要**: 未经同意的亲密图像（NCII），也称为基于图像的性虐待（IBSA），是通过在线平台进行调解的。受害者幸存者必须求助平台收集证据并请求删除内容。平台充当犯罪现场、法官和陪审团，确定犯罪者是否面临后果以及有害材料是否被清除。我们根据对 13 名参与者进行的创伤知情访谈，提出了一项关于 NCII 受害者幸存者在线报告经历的研究。我们发现平台报告流程是敌对的、不透明的和低效的，常常将复杂的危害强加到狭窄的界面中，响应不一致，并且无法采取有意义的行动。利用制度背叛理论，我们展示了平台的结构和实践如何加剧伤害，并在此过程中提出具体的干预点，以重新设计报告系统和制定政策，以更好地支持受害者幸存者
> **Abstract**: Non-consensual intimate imagery (NCII), also known as image-based sexual abuse (IBSA), is mediated through online platforms. Victim-survivors must turn to platforms to collect evidence and request content removal. Platforms act as the crime scene, judge, and jury, determining whether perpetrators face consequences and if harmful material is removed. We present a study of NCII victim-survivors' online reporting experiences, drawing on trauma-informed interviews with 13 participants. We find that platform reporting processes are hostile, opaque, and ineffective, often forcing complex harms into narrow interfaces, responding inconsistently, and failing to result in meaningful action. Leveraging institutional betrayal theory, we show how platforms' structures and practices compound harm, and, in doing so, surface concrete intervention points for redesigning reporting systems and shaping policy to better support victim-survivors

【8】Fostering human learning is crucial for boosting human-AI synergy
- **标题**: 促进人类学习对于促进人类与人工智能的协同作用至关重要
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13253
> **作者**: Julian Berger,Jason W. Burton,Ralph Hertwig,Thomas Kosch,Ralf H. J. M. Kurvers,Benito Kurzenberger,Christopher Lazik,Linda Onnasch,Tobias Rieger,Anna I. Thoma,Dirk U. Wulff,Stefan M. Herzog
> **摘要**: 与单独行动相比，人类和人工智能 (AI) 之间的合作有望取得更出色的成果。尽管如此，我们对促进人类与人工智能协同作用的条件的理解仍然有限。最近的一项荟萃​​分析表明，平均而言，人类与人工智能的组合并不优于更好的个体智能体，这表明人类与人工智能的整体协同作用是负面的。我们认为，这种悲观的结论源于所使用的实验设计中对人类学习的重视不够。为了证实这一说法，我们重新分析了原始荟萃分析中包含的所有 74 项研究，得出了两项新发现。首先，之前的大多数研究都忽视了促进人类学习的设计特征，例如向参与者提供逐项试验的结果反馈。其次，我们使用稳健的贝叶斯元回归进行的重新分析表明，提供结果反馈的研究比没有结果反馈的研究显示出相对更高的协同作用。至关重要的是，当反馈与人工智能解释配对时，我们往往会发现积极的人类与人工智能协同作用，而没有反馈的人工智能解释则与负面协同作用密切相关，这表明只有当人类能够学会通过反馈验证人工智能的可靠性时，解释才对协同作用有用。我们的结论是，当前的文献低估了人类与人工智能协作的潜力，因为它主要依赖于不利于人类学习的实验设计，从而阻碍了人类有效地调整其协作策略。因此，我们提倡人机交互研究的范式转变，明确纳入和测试人类学习机制，以增强我们对成功的人机协作的理解和支持。
> **Abstract**: The collaboration between humans and artificial intelligence (AI) holds the promise of achieving superior outcomes compared to either acting alone. Nevertheless, our understanding of the conditions that facilitate such human-AI synergy remains limited. A recent meta-analysis showed that, on average, human-AI combinations do not outperform the better individual agent, indicating overall negative human-AI synergy. We argue that this pessimistic conclusion arises from insufficient attention to human learning in the experimental designs used. To substantiate this claim, we re-analyzed all 74 studies included in the original meta-analysis, which yielded two new findings. First, most previous research overlooked design features that foster human learning, such as providing trial-by-trial outcome feedback to participants. Second, our re-analysis, using robust Bayesian meta-regressions, demonstrated that studies providing outcome feedback show relatively higher synergy than those without outcome feedback. Crucially, when feedback is paired with AI explanations we tend to find positive human-AI synergy, while AI explanations provided without feedback were strongly linked to negative synergy, indicating that explanations are useful for synergy only when humans can learn to verify the AI's reliability through feedback. We conclude that the current literature underestimates the potential for human-AI collaboration because it predominantly relies on experimental designs that do not facilitate human learning, thus hindering humans from effectively adapting their collaboration strategies. We therefore advocate for a paradigm shift in human-AI interaction research that explicitly incorporates and tests human learning mechanisms to enhance our understanding of and support for successful human-AI collaboration.

【9】Legitimizing, Developing, and Sustaining Feminist HCI in East Asia: Challenges and Opportunities
- **标题**: 东亚女权主义人机交互的合法化、发展和维持：挑战与机遇
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13000
> **作者**: Runhua Zhang,Ruyuan Wan,Jiaqi,Li,Daye Kang,Yigang Qin,Yijia Wang,Ziqi Pan,Tiffany Knearem,Huamin Qu,Xiaojuan Ma
> **摘要**: 近年来，女权主义人机交互在东亚背景下迅速发展。该地区独特的文化和政治背景贡献了宝贵的情境知识，揭示了诸如本地化数字女权主义实践或女性在社会期望中复杂的导航等主题。然而，支撑这些观点的因素也给东亚研究人员带来了重大的生存挑战。其中包括缺乏专门资金、被认为不如以生产力为导向的技术有价值的耻辱，以及缺乏高级研究人员和成熟的、有弹性的社区。基于这些挑战和我们之前的集体实践，我们建议这次会议有两个重点目标：(1) 为女权主义人机交互研究人员提供一个联系和建立社区的合法渠道，​​(2) 促进以行动为导向的对话，讨论如何在东亚背景下使女权主义人机交互合法化、发展和维持。本次聚会的网站是：https://feminist-hci.github.io/
> **Abstract**: Feminist HCI has been rapidly developing in East Asian contexts in recent years. The region's unique cultural and political backgrounds have contributed valuable, situated knowledge, revealing topics such as localized digital feminism practices, or women's complex navigation among social expectations. However, the very factors that ground these perspectives also create significant survival challenges for researchers in East Asia. These include a scarcity of dedicated funding, the stigma of being perceived as less valuable than productivity-oriented technologies, and the lack of senior researchers and established, resilient communities. Grounded in these challenges and our prior collective practices, we propose this meet-up with two focused goals: (1) to provide a legitimized channel for Feminist HCI researchers to connect and build community, and (2) to facilitate an action-oriented dialogue on how to legitimize, develop, and sustain Feminist HCI in the East Asian context. The website for this meet-up is: https://feminist-hci.github.io/

【10】Tangible Intangibles: Exploring Embodied Emotion in Mixed Reality for Art Therapy
- **标题**: 有形无形：探索混合现实中的具体情感以进行艺术治疗
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.12891
> **作者**: Mahsa Nasri,Mahnoosh Jahanian,Wei Wu,Binyan Xu,Casper Harteveld
> **摘要**: 这个面对面的工作室探索混合现实 (MR) 和生物识别技术如何通过具体的艺术实践使无形的情感状态变得有形。我们从两种行之有效的模式开始，即粘土雕塑和自由形式的二维绘图，让参与者具备躯体意识和手动、反思性表达。在此基础上，我们引入了一个 MR 原型，将生理信号（例如呼吸、心率变异性、眼动动态）映射到视觉和空间参数（颜色饱和度、脉冲、运动质量），生成“3D 情感伪影”。全天课程平衡了理论（躯体心理学、具身认知、表达性生物信号）、动手制作和比较反思，以探究模拟和数字方式分别为意识、表达和表达提供了哪些支持。意义创造。参与者将 (1) 体验并比较模拟和基于 MR 的情感日记； (2) 从生物信号到视觉/空间反馈的原型和批评映射； (3) 阐明创伤知情的混合工作流程的设计原则，增强内感受素养，而不会让用户不知所措。预期的贡献包括生物特征表达的共享设计词汇、未来 TEI 情感归档工作的一组生成约束，以及自动翻译何时支持或阻碍具体联系的可操作见解。
> **Abstract**: This in-person studio explores how mixed reality (MR) and biometrics can make intangible emotional states tangible through embodied art practices. We begin with two well-established modalities, clay sculpting and free-form 2D drawing, to ground participants in somatic awareness and manual, reflective expression. Building on this baseline, we introduce an MR prototype that maps physiological signals (e.g., breath, heart rate variability, eye movement dynamics) to visual and spatial parameters (color saturation, pulsing, motion qualities), generating ''3D emotional artifacts.'' The full-day program balances theory (somatic psychology, embodied cognition, expressive biosignals), hands-on making, and comparative reflection to interrogate what analog and digital modalities respectively afford for awareness, expression, and meaning-making. Participants will (1) experience and compare analog and MR-based journaling of emotion; (2) prototype and critique mappings from biosignals to visual/spatial feedback; and (3) articulate design principles for trauma-informed, hybrid workflows that amplify interoceptive literacy without overwhelming the user. The expected contributions include a shared design vocabulary for biometric expressivity, a set of generative constraints for future TEI work on emotional archiving, and actionable insights into when automated translation supports or hinders embodied connection.

【11】Decoding Human and AI Persuasion in National College Debate: Analyzing Prepared Arguments Through Aristotle's Rhetorical Principles
- **标题**: 解码国家大学辩论中的人类和人工智能说服：通过亚里士多德的修辞原理分析准备好的论点
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.12817
> **作者**: Mengqian Wu,Jiayi Zhang,Raymond Z. Zhang
> **摘要**: 辩论已被广泛采用作为增强英语语言艺术（ELA）批判性思维技能的策略。辩论中的一项重要技能是形成有效的论证，这要求辩论者从文献中选择支持性证据并构建令人信服的主张。然而，这项技能的训练很大程度上依赖于人工指导，这是劳动密集型的且难以规模化。为了更好地支持学生准备辩论，本研究探讨了利用人工智能产生有效论据的潜力。具体来说，我们促使 GPT-4 创建一张证据卡，并将其与人类辩手制作的证据卡进行比较。证据卡概述了学生将提出的论点以及如何表达这些论点，包括基于文献的证据引用、核心思想摘要、逐字阅读脚本和标签（即论点的标题）等组成部分。我们使用亚里士多德的修辞原则：ethos（可信度）、pathos（情感吸引力）和 logos（逻辑推理），比较了 GPT 和学生辩手创建的证据卡中论点的质量。通过基于修辞原则的系统定性和定量分析，我们确定了人类和 GPT 在辩论推理中的优势和局限性，概述了人工智能的重点和理由与人类推理一致或不同的领域。我们的研究结果有助于人工智能辅助学习干预措施不断发展的作用，为学生辩手如何制定增强其论证和推理技能的策略提供见解。
> **Abstract**: Debate has been widely adopted as a strategy to enhance critical thinking skills in English Language Arts (ELA). One important skill in debate is forming effective argumentation, which requires debaters to select supportive evidence from literature and construct compelling claims. However, the training of this skill largely depends on human coaching, which is labor-intensive and difficult to scale. To better support students in preparing for debates, this study explores the potential of leveraging artificial intelligence to generate effective arguments. Specifically, we prompted GPT-4 to create an evidence card and compared it to those produced by human debaters. The evidence cards outline the arguments students will present and how those arguments will be delivered, including components such as literature-based evidence quotations, summaries of core ideas, verbatim reading scripts, and tags (i.e., titles of the arguments). We compared the quality of the arguments in the evidence cards created by GPT and student debaters using Aristotle's rhetorical principles: ethos (credibility), pathos (emotional appeal), and logos (logical reasoning). Through a systematic qualitative and quantitative analysis, grounded in the rhetorical principles, we identify the strengths and limitations of human and GPT in debate reasoning, outlining areas where AI's focus and justifications align with or diverge from human reasoning. Our findings contribute to the evolving role of AI-assisted learning interventions, offering insights into how student debaters can develop strategies that enhance their argumentation and reasoning skills.

【12】Designing The Drive: Enhancing User Experience through Adaptive Interfaces in Autonomous Vehicles
- **标题**: 设计驱动器：通过自动驾驶车辆的自适应界面增强用户体验
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.12773
> **作者**: Reeteesha Roy
> **摘要**: 随着自动驾驶汽车（AV）在现代世界交通系统中的发展和集成，定制用户界面以优化整体用户体验的重要性日益凸显。因此，随着这些技术的不断普及，了解用户的需求和偏好对于接受和信任这些技术至关重要。本文讨论了人机交互原理在界面个性化中的实施，以提高用户的安全性和可用性。本文探讨了如何设计个性化界面，通过自适应设计、多模式交互和用户反馈机制等各种人机交互策略来提高用户参与度和满意度。此外，本文强调界面设计中的透明度和用户控制因素；因此，允许用户设计或修改他们的体验可以促进对自治系统的信任的增加。在此过程中，这项研究触及了人机交互在未来自动驾驶汽车场景中将发挥的相当有影响力的作用，同时设计确保满足用户的多样化需求，同时保持高标准的安全和保障。本文讨论了各种人机交互策略，例如自适应设计、多模式交互和用户反馈机制，展示了个性化界面如何显着提高用户参与度和满意度。进一步讨论了界面设计中的透明度和用户控制，指出需要一个先决条件，使用户能够控制自己的体验，作为自治系统的信任状态。总之，本文指出了人机交互在自动驾驶汽车开发中的作用，并解决了与这些强制安全标准相关的众多需求。
> **Abstract**: With the recent development and integration of autonomous vehicles (AVs) in transportation systems of the modern world, the emphasis on customizing user interfaces to optimize the overall user experience has been growing expediently. Therefore, understanding user needs and preferences is essential to the acceptance and trust of these technologies as they continue to grow in prevalence. This paper addresses the implementation of HCI principles in the personalization of interfaces to improve safety, security, and usability for the users. This paper explores the way that personalized interfaces can be devised to increase user engagement and satisfaction through various HCI strategies such as adaptive design, multi-modal interaction, and user feedback mechanisms. Moreover, this paper puts emphasis on factors of transparency and user control in the design of an interface; hence, allowing users to design or modify their experience could foster an increase in trust in autonomous systems. In so doing, this research touches on the quite influential role HCI will play in this future scenario of autonomous vehicles while designing to ensure relevance to the diverse needs of users while maintaining high standards of safety and security. Discussing various HCI strategies such as adaptive design, multi-modal interaction, and feedback mechanisms to the user, this paper demonstrates how personalized interfaces can enhance significantly both user engagement and satisfaction. Transparency and user control also in designing an interface are further discussed, pointing out the need for a prerequisite condition of enabling the user to take control of their experience as a state of trust in autonomous systems. In summary, this paper points out the role of HCI in the development of autonomous vehicles and addresses numerous needs with respect to those enforced safety and security standards.

## 信息检索(cs.IR:Information Retrieval)

【1】SPARQL-LLM: Real-Time SPARQL Query Generation from Natural Language Questions
- **标题**: SPARQL-LLM：根据自然语言问题生成实时 SPARQL 查询
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14277
> **作者**: Panayiotis Smeros,Vincent Emonet,Ruijie Wang,Ana-Claudia Sima,Tarcisio Mendes de Farias
> **摘要**: 大型语言模型的出现促进了新方法的出现，这些新方法有望更好地应对从自然语言生成结构化查询（例如 SPARQL 查询）的挑战。然而，这些新方法主要关注单个源的响应准确性，而忽略其他评估标准，例如分布式数据存储上的联合查询能力，以及生成 SPARQL 查询的运行时间和成本。因此，它们通常不适合生产，也不易于在（可能联合的）知识图上以良好的准确性进行部署。为了缓解这些问题，在本文中，我们扩展了之前的工作，描述并系统地评估了 SPARQL-LLM，这是一种开源且与三重存储无关的方法，由轻量级元数据提供支持，可从自然语言文本生成 SPARQL 查询。首先，我们描述它的架构，它由用于元数据索引、提示构建以及查询生成和执行的专用组件组成。然后，我们根据最先进的多语言问题挑战以及来自生物信息学领域三个最流行的知识图谱的问题集合对其进行评估。我们的结果表明，在最先进的挑战、对英语和西班牙语等高资源语言的适应性以及形成复杂和联合生物信息学查询的能力方面，F1 分数大幅提高了 24%。此外，我们还表明，SPARQL-LLM 的速度比参与挑战的其他系统快 36 倍，而每个问题的成本最高为 0.01 美元，使其适合实时、低成本的文本到 SPARQL 应用程序。可以在 https://www.expasy.org/chat 上找到部署在现实世界的去中心化知识图上的此类应用程序。
> **Abstract**: The advent of large language models is contributing to the emergence of novel approaches that promise to better tackle the challenge of generating structured queries, such as SPARQL queries, from natural language. However, these new approaches mostly focus on response accuracy over a single source while ignoring other evaluation criteria, such as federated query capability over distributed data stores, as well as runtime and cost to generate SPARQL queries. Consequently, they are often not production-ready or easy to deploy over (potentially federated) knowledge graphs with good accuracy. To mitigate these issues, in this paper, we extend our previous work and describe and systematically evaluate SPARQL-LLM, an open-source and triplestore-agnostic approach, powered by lightweight metadata, that generates SPARQL queries from natural language text. First, we describe its architecture, which consists of dedicated components for metadata indexing, prompt building, and query generation and execution. Then, we evaluate it based on a state-of-the-art challenge with multilingual questions, and a collection of questions from three of the most prevalent knowledge graphs within the field of bioinformatics. Our results demonstrate a substantial increase of 24% in the F1 Score on the state-of-the-art challenge, adaptability to high-resource languages such as English and Spanish, as well as ability to form complex and federated bioinformatics queries. Furthermore, we show that SPARQL-LLM is up to 36x faster than other systems participating in the challenge, while costing a maximum of $0.01 per question, making it suitable for real-time, low-cost text-to-SPARQL applications. One such application deployed over real-world decentralized knowledge graphs can be found at https://www.expasy.org/chat.

【2】Know Your Users! Estimating User Domain Knowledge in Conversational Recommenders
- **标题**: 了解您的用户！估计会话推荐中的用户领域知识
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13173
> **作者**: Ivica Kostric,Ujwal Gadiraju,Krisztian Balog
> **摘要**: 理想的对话式推荐系统（CRS）就像一位精明的销售人员，根据每个用户的专业水平调整其语言和建议。然而，大多数当前系统将所有用户视为专家，当用户不熟悉某个领域时，会导致令人沮丧且低效的交互。能够根据用户的知识水平调整对话策略的系统将提供更加自然和有效的体验。为了向这种自适应系统迈出一步，我们引入了一项新任务：从对话中估计用户领域知识，使 CRS 能够更好地了解用户需求并个性化交互。开发这种自适应系统的一个主要障碍是缺乏合适的数据；据我们所知，没有现有的数据集能够捕获具有不同领域知识水平的用户的对话行为。此外，在大多数对话收集协议中，用户可以自由表达自己的偏好，这些偏好往往集中在流行的项目和众所周知的功能上，而很少深入了解新手如何探索或了解不熟悉的功能。为了解决这个问题，我们设计了一个基于游戏的数据收集协议，它可以引发不同的知识表达，发布结果数据集，并提供初步分析，以突出其未来在用户知识感知 CRS 方面的潜力。
> **Abstract**: The ideal conversational recommender system (CRS) acts like a savvy salesperson, adapting its language and suggestions to each user's level of expertise. However, most current systems treat all users as experts, leading to frustrating and inefficient interactions when users are unfamiliar with a domain. Systems that can adapt their conversational strategies to a user's knowledge level stand to offer a much more natural and effective experience. To make a step toward such adaptive systems, we introduce a new task: estimating user domain knowledge from conversations, enabling a CRS to better understand user needs and personalize interactions. A key obstacle to developing such adaptive systems is the lack of suitable data; to our knowledge, no existing dataset captures the conversational behaviors of users with varying levels of domain knowledge. Furthermore, in most dialogue collection protocols, users are free to express their own preferences, which tends to concentrate on popular items and well-known features, offering little insight into how novices explore or learn about unfamiliar features. To address this, we design a game-based data collection protocol that elicits varied expressions of knowledge, release the resulting dataset, and provide an initial analysis to highlight its potential for future work on user-knowledge-aware CRS.

【3】A Simple and Effective Framework for Symmetric Consistent Indexing in Large-Scale Dense Retrieval
- **标题**: 大规模密集检索中对称一致索引的简单有效框架
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.13074
> **作者**: Huimu Wang,Yiming Qiu,Xingzhi Yao,Zhiguo Chen,Guoyu Tang,Songlin Wang,Sulong Xu,Mingming Li
> **摘要**: 密集检索因其高效率和有竞争力的准确性而成为大规模信息检索系统的行业标准。其核心依赖于由粗到细的分层架构，能够实现快速候选选择和精准语义匹配，实现十亿规模语料库的毫秒级响应。这种功能不仅在传统搜索和推荐场景中至关重要，而且在由大型语言模型驱动的新兴生成推荐范式中也至关重要，其中语义 ID（本身是一种从粗到细的表示形式）发挥着基础作用。然而，广泛采用的双塔编码架构带来了固有的挑战，主要是表示空间错位和检索索引不一致，这降低了匹配精度、检索稳定性和长尾查询的性能。这些问题在语义 ID 生成中进一步放大，最终限制了下游生成模型的性能上限。为了应对这些挑战，本文提出了一个简单而有效的框架，名为 SCI，它包含两个协同模块：对称表示对齐模块，采用创新的输入交换机制来统一双塔表示空间，无需添加参数；双塔协同模块的一致索引，使用双视图索引策略重新设计检索路径，以保持从训练到推理的一致性。该框架系统化、轻量级、工程友好，需要最小的开销，同时完全支持十亿规模的部署。我们为我们的方法提供了理论保证，其有效性通过公共数据集和现实世界电子商务数据集的结果得到验证。
> **Abstract**: Dense retrieval has become the industry standard in large-scale information retrieval systems due to its high efficiency and competitive accuracy. Its core relies on a coarse-to-fine hierarchical architecture that enables rapid candidate selection and precise semantic matching, achieving millisecond-level response over billion-scale corpora. This capability makes it essential not only in traditional search and recommendation scenarios but also in the emerging paradigm of generative recommendation driven by large language models, where semantic IDs-themselves a form of coarse-to-fine representation-play a foundational role. However, the widely adopted dual-tower encoding architecture introduces inherent challenges, primarily representational space misalignment and retrieval index inconsistency, which degrade matching accuracy, retrieval stability, and performance on long-tail queries. These issues are further magnified in semantic ID generation, ultimately limiting the performance ceiling of downstream generative models. To address these challenges, this paper proposes a simple and effective framework named SCI comprising two synergistic modules: a symmetric representation alignment module that employs an innovative input-swapping mechanism to unify the dual-tower representation space without adding parameters, and an consistent indexing with dual-tower synergy module that redesigns retrieval paths using a dual-view indexing strategy to maintain consistency from training to inference. The framework is systematic, lightweight, and engineering-friendly, requiring minimal overhead while fully supporting billion-scale deployment. We provide theoretical guarantees for our approach, with its effectiveness validated by results across public datasets and real-world e-commerce datasets.

## 机器学习(cs.LG:Machine Learning)

【1】gridfm-datakit-v1: A Python Library for Scalable and Realistic Power Flow and Optimal Power Flow Data Generation
- **标题**: gridfm-datakit-v1：用于生成可扩展且真实的潮流和最佳潮流数据的 Python 库
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14658
> **作者**: Alban Puech,Matteo Mazzonelli,Celia Cintas,Tamara R. Govindasamy,Mangaliso Mngomezulu,Jonas Weiss,Matteo Baù,Anna Varbella,François Mirallès,Kibaek Kim,Le Xie,Hendrik F. Hamann,Etienne Vos,Thomas Brunschwiler
> **摘要**: 我们引入了 gridfm-datakit-v1，这是一个 Python 库，用于生成真实且多样化的潮流 (PF) 和最佳潮流 (OPF) 数据集，用于训练机器学习 (ML) 求解器。现有的数据集和库面临三个主要挑战：（1）缺乏现实的随机负载和拓扑扰动，限制了场景多样性； (2) PF 数据集仅限于 OPF 可行点，阻碍了 ML 求解器泛化到违反操作限制的情况（例如，分支过载或电压违规）； (3) OPF 数据集使用固定的发电机成本函数，限制了不同成本的泛化。 gridfm-datakit 通过以下方式解决这些挑战：（1）将真实世界配置文件的全局负载缩放与局部噪声相结合，并支持任意 N-k 拓扑扰动，以创建多样化但真实的数据集； (2) 生成超出操作限制的 PF 样本； (3) 生成具有不同发电机成本的 OPF 数据。它还可以有效地扩展到大型网格（最多 10,000 辆公交车）。提供了与 OPFData、OPF-Learn、PGLearn 和 PF$Δ$ 的比较。可通过 Apache 2.0 下的 GitHub https://github.com/gridfm/gridfm-datakit 和“pip install gridfm-datakit”获取。
> **Abstract**: We introduce gridfm-datakit-v1, a Python library for generating realistic and diverse Power Flow (PF) and Optimal Power Flow (OPF) datasets for training Machine Learning (ML) solvers. Existing datasets and libraries face three main challenges: (1) lack of realistic stochastic load and topology perturbations, limiting scenario diversity; (2) PF datasets are restricted to OPF-feasible points, hindering generalization of ML solvers to cases that violate operating limits (e.g., branch overloads or voltage violations); and (3) OPF datasets use fixed generator cost functions, limiting generalization across varying costs. gridfm-datakit addresses these challenges by: (1) combining global load scaling from real-world profiles with localized noise and supporting arbitrary N-k topology perturbations to create diverse yet realistic datasets; (2) generating PF samples beyond operating limits; and (3) producing OPF data with varying generator costs. It also scales efficiently to large grids (up to 10,000 buses). Comparisons with OPFData, OPF-Learn, PGLearn, and PF$Δ$ are provided. Available on GitHub at https://github.com/gridfm/gridfm-datakit under Apache 2.0 and via `pip install gridfm-datakit`.

【2】Model-Based Reinforcement Learning in Discrete-Action Non-Markovian Reward Decision Processes
- **标题**: 离散动作非马尔可夫奖励决策过程中基于模型的强化学习
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14617
> **作者**: Alessandro Trapasso,Luca Iocchi,Fabio Patrizi
> **摘要**: 许多实际决策问题涉及的任务的成功取决于整个系统历史，而不是实现具有所需属性的状态。马尔可夫强化学习 (RL) 方法不适合此类任务，而具有非马尔可夫奖励决策过程 (NMRDP) 的 RL 使代理能够处理时间依赖性任务。长期以来，人们都知道这种方法缺乏对（接近）最优性和样本效率的正式保证。我们利用 QR-MAX 为解决这两个问题做出了贡献，QR-MAX 是一种基于模型的新颖离散 NMRDP 算法，可通过奖励机器从非马尔可夫奖励处理中分解马尔可夫转移学习。据我们所知，这是第一个用于离散动作 NMRDP 的基于模型的 RL 算法，它利用这种分解来获得 PAC 收敛到具有多项式样本复杂性的 $\varepsilon$ 最优策略。然后，我们使用 Bucket-QR-MAX 将 QR-MAX 扩展到连续状态空间，Bucket-QR-MAX 是一种基于 SimHash 的离散器，它保留相同的因式分解结构，无需手动网格化或函数逼近即可实现快速稳定的学习。我们在复杂性不断增加的环境中将我们的方法与现代最先进的基于模型的强化学习方法进行实验比较，结果表明样本效率显着提高，并且在寻找最佳策略方面增强了鲁棒性。
> **Abstract**: Many practical decision-making problems involve tasks whose success depends on the entire system history, rather than on achieving a state with desired properties. Markovian Reinforcement Learning (RL) approaches are not suitable for such tasks, while RL with non-Markovian reward decision processes (NMRDPs) enables agents to tackle temporal-dependency tasks. This approach has long been known to lack formal guarantees on both (near-)optimality and sample efficiency. We contribute to solving both issues with QR-MAX, a novel model-based algorithm for discrete NMRDPs that factorizes Markovian transition learning from non-Markovian reward handling via reward machines. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first model-based RL algorithm for discrete-action NMRDPs that exploits this factorization to obtain PAC convergence to $\varepsilon$-optimal policies with polynomial sample complexity. We then extend QR-MAX to continuous state spaces with Bucket-QR-MAX, a SimHash-based discretiser that preserves the same factorized structure and achieves fast and stable learning without manual gridding or function approximation. We experimentally compare our method with modern state-of-the-art model-based RL approaches on environments of increasing complexity, showing a significant improvement in sample efficiency and increased robustness in finding optimal policies.

【3】Residual GRU+MHSA: A Lightweight Hybrid Recurrent Attention Model for Cardiovascular Disease Detection
- **标题**: Residual GRU+MHSA：一种用于心血管疾病检测的轻量级混合循环注意力模型
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14563
> **作者**: Tejaswani Dash,Gautam Datla,Anudeep Vurity,Tazeem Ahmad,Mohd Adnan,Saima Rafi,Saisha Patro,Saina Patro
> **摘要**: 心血管疾病（CVD）仍然是全球死亡的主要原因，这凸显了需要可靠、高效的预测工具来支持早期干预。传统的诊断方法依赖于手工制作的特征和临床医生的专业知识，而机器学习方法可以提高可重复性，但往往难以在嘈杂和异构的临床数据中进行概括。在这项工作中，我们提出了具有多头自注意力的 Residual GRU，这是一种专为表格临床记录设计的紧凑深度学习架构。该模型集成了用于特征列顺序建模的残差双向门控循环单元、通道重新加权块以及带有可学习分类标记的多头自注意力池，以捕获全局上下文。我们使用 5 折分层交叉验证在 UCI 心脏病数据集上评估模型，并将其与逻辑回归、随机森林和支持向量机等经典方法以及包括 DeepMLP、卷积网络、循环网络和 Transformers 等现代深度学习基线进行比较。所提出的模型的准确度为 0.861，宏观 F1 为 0.860，ROC-AUC 为 0.908，PR-AUC 为 0.904，优于所有基线。消融研究证实了残余复发、通道门控和注意力集中的个体贡献。 t-SNE 可视化进一步表明，与原始特征相比，学习的嵌入在疾病和非疾病类别之间表现出更清晰的分离。这些结果表明，轻量级混合循环和基于注意力的架构在临床风险预测的准确性和效率之间提供了强有力的平衡，支持在资源有限的医疗保健环境中的部署。
> **Abstract**: Cardiovascular disease (CVD) remains the leading cause of mortality worldwide, underscoring the need for reliable and efficient predictive tools that support early intervention. Traditional diagnostic approaches rely on handcrafted features and clinician expertise, while machine learning methods improve reproducibility but often struggle to generalize across noisy and heterogeneous clinical data. In this work, we propose Residual GRU with Multi-Head Self-Attention, a compact deep learning architecture designed for tabular clinical records. The model integrates residual bidirectional gated recurrent units for sequential modeling of feature columns, a channel reweighting block, and multi-head self-attention pooling with a learnable classification token to capture global context. We evaluate the model on the UCI Heart Disease dataset using 5-fold stratified cross-validation and compare it against classical methods such as Logistic Regression, Random Forest, and Support Vector Machines, as well as modern deep learning baselines including DeepMLP, convolutional networks, recurrent networks, and Transformers. The proposed model achieves an accuracy of 0.861, macro-F1 of 0.860, ROC-AUC of 0.908, and PR-AUC of 0.904, outperforming all baselines. Ablation studies confirm the individual contributions of residual recurrence, channel gating, and attention pooling. t-SNE visualizations further indicate that the learned embeddings exhibit clearer separation between disease and non-disease classes compared to raw features. These results demonstrate that lightweight hybrid recurrent and attention-based architectures provide a strong balance between accuracy and efficiency for clinical risk prediction, supporting deployment in resource-constrained healthcare settings.

【4】RePo: Language Models with Context Re-Positioning
- **标题**: RePo：具有上下文重新定位的语言模型
- **链接**: https://arxiv.org/abs/2512.14391
> **作者**: Huayang Li,Tianyu Zhao,Richard Sproat
> **摘要**: 上下文学习是现代大型语言模型（LLM）的基础；然而，流行的架构通过分配线性或恒定的位置索引来强加严格且固定的上下文结构。根据认知负荷理论（CLT），我们认为这种无信息的结构增加了无关的认知负荷，消耗了本应分配给深度推理和注意力分配的有限工作记忆容量。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了 RePo，这是一种通过上下文重新定位来减少无关负载的新颖机制。与标准方法不同，RePo 利用可微分模块 $f_φ$ 来分配捕获上下文依赖关系的标记位置，而不是回复预定义的整数范围。通过在 OLMo-2 1B 主干上不断进行预训练，我们证明 RePo 显着提高了涉及噪声上下文、结构化数据和较长上下文长度的任务的性能，同时保持了一般短上下文任务的竞争性能。详细分析表明，RePo 成功地将更高的注意力分配给遥远但相关的信息，在密集和非线性空间中分配位置，并捕获输入上下文的内在结构。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/SakanaAI/repo 获取。
